nasb.text: Herodias had a grudge against him and wanted to put him to death and could not do so;

esv.text: And Herodias had a grudge against him and wanted to put him to death. But she could not,

cnv.text: 於是希羅底懷恨在心，想要殺他，只是不能。

ccb.text: 希罗底对约翰怀恨在心，想要杀掉他，只是不能得逞。

csbs.text: 所以希罗迪娅对约翰怀恨在心，想要杀他，只是不能。
